title: Soniox Recognizer Options
description: Soniox-specific STT options. Only applies when recognizer vendor is 'soniox'.

languageHints.description: Language hints for the v5 multilingual model, as ISO language codes (e.g. ['en','es']). Improves accuracy and speeds up language detection.

enableLanguageIdentification.description: Enable language identification (v5); each recognized token is tagged with its detected language.

enableSpeakerDiarization.description: Enable speaker diarization (v5); each recognized token is tagged with a speaker.

endpointSensitivity.description: Endpoint detection sensitivity (v5), -1.0 to 1.0 (default 0.0). Higher values finalize endpoints faster; lower values are more conservative.

maxEndpointDelayMs.description: Maximum delay in milliseconds before an endpoint is forced (v5), 500-3000 (default 2000).

maxNonFinalTokensDurationMs.description: Maximum duration in milliseconds that tokens may remain non-final before forced finalization (v5).

speechContext.description: Free-text background context for improved recognition (v5 context.text). The generic recognizer 'hints' are sent as the v5 context.terms vocabulary-boost list.

storage.description: Soniox storage configuration for persisting transcripts.
